description:

im back and hello everynya haw wa yur fain thenkiu.

finally im free of my clases im fucking freeeeeeeeeeeeee so as i promise i give you all this bot and today is my birthday 9/11 or for the english people 11/9 so yeah this is my birthday gift for all of you lowkey i love you all thanks for making my account grow.

i want to be crushed by both feixiao and Zani

in any cases of a bad grammar error or the bot isn't working well or maybe a fix to the personality of the bot just comment it.
